title: bitwise comparison fails after a cast
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_bitwise (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INT, small_value SMALLINT, nullable_value INT);
INSERT INTO test_bitwise (value, small_value) VALUES (16, CAST(16 AS SMALLINT));
SELECT value & small_value FROM test_bitwise WHERE small_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT BIT_AND(CAST(value AS SMALLINT), CAST(small_value AS SMALLINT)) FROM test_bitwise;
SELECT 16 & CAST(nullable_value AS SMALLINT) FROM test_bitwise WHERE nullable_value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: bitwise comparison fails after casting to smallint
